title: Golden Shovel
description:
Varia Addons

The golden shovel can dig through anything that isn’t cursed rock, at a faster pace than the base shovel.

title: Void Shovel
description:
Varia Addons

The void shovel can dig through anything, and sports both the fastest speed, and biggest radius of effect of all the shovels.

 Should spawn in the Gold Biome, but Apotheosis moves it further right

title: Nuclear Shovel
description:
Varia Addons

This will instantly kill you if you don’t have fire immunity and explosion immunity. On a lighter note, have fun!

title: Draco Ferrio
description:
Varia Addons

This legendary sword caries a rapid slash combo, with a powerful finisher, and easily sports enough DPS for NG+

title: Subjugation Rifle
description:
Varia Addons

With crits that go up to 30k, this rifle can one-shot almost anything. It’s painful reload time and recoil makes it very tough to use however.

title: Aavikon Lohikäärme
description:
Varia Addons

It’s dual shields and big bullets make this a powerful weapon for both defense and offense. SpazProject’s personal weapon.

title: Polar Star
description:
Varia Addons

A solid early game weapon if you have nothing better. The polar star is ready to help you forge your own story in the caves.

title: Completionist’s Codex
description:
Varia Addons

For the absolute completionist. Dev Spells are the glue that hold special weapons together, and this codex has all of them for free use.

title: Bre-si’s Trident
description:
Varia Addons

This trident packs incredible damage underwater, and will easily take you into NG+ and beyond. Just take care not to drown yourself while using it.
